scripts.test: docker compose -f ../../docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:15432/auth_db} prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:15432/auth_db} NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config jest.config.cjs --runInBand
scripts.test:docker: docker compose -f ../../docker-compose.yml build auth-service && docker compose -f ../../docker-compose.yml run -T --rm auth-service sh -lc 'pnpm --filter @ai-service-desk/auth-service exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma && NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules pnpm --filter @ai-service-desk/auth-service exec jest --config jest.config.cjs --runInBand'
